Description: Smelting with non-conformant smelter in high-risk country - should trigger RMAP FAIL + OECD FLAG
Smelting with unknown smelter ID - should trigger RMAP FLAG
Extraction in DRC (high-risk OECD Annex II country) - should trigger OECD FLAG
Extraction by sanctioned entity in high-risk country - should trigger OECD FAIL
Trading by sanctioned entity - should trigger OECD FAIL
Export from Burundi (high-risk) - should trigger OECD FLAG
Smelting with conformant smelter in low-risk country - should PASS all checks
Extraction in Austria (low-risk) by clean actor - should PASS
